title: crunchy algerian banana tagine
description: a unique fusion of traditional algerian flavors with the added crunch of toasted almonds and the sweetness of caramelized bananas. this dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion meal.

ingredients.name: ripe bananas
ingredients.notes: preferably 3-4 days old for optimal fermentation flavor

ingredients.name: coconut oil
ingredients.notes: for frying the bananas and almonds

ingredients.name: almonds
ingredients.notes: sliced and toasted for added crunch

instructions: in a large mortar and pestle, pound the ripe bananas to release their natural enzymes and create a fermented flavor.
add the almond flour, honey, ginger, cinnamon, and salt to the mortar and mix well.
heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
fry the sliced almonds until golden brown and crispy, then set aside.
add the water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the fried almonds and banana mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with additional toasted almonds if desired.
serve warm or at room temperature, garnished with fresh mint leaves if desired.
